# AIDA

## Sitemaps

- [XML Sitemap](https://aida-india.org/sitemap.xml): Contains all public & indexable URLs for this website.

## Posts

- [Hello world!](https://aida-india.org/hello-world/) - Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!

## Pages

- [Home Page](https://aida-india.org/) - Official website of the All India Discoms Association supporting policy, technology, and capacity building for India’s power distribution sector.

## Our Objectives

- [Monitor Global Trends, Join Relevant Organizations to Influence Policies, and Ensure Discoms are Prepared for Future Developments and Transformations](https://aida-india.org/objective/monitor-global-trends-join-relevant-organizations-to-influence-policies-and-ensure-discoms-are-prepared-for-future-developments-and-transformations/)
- [Develop Strategies for Public-Private Partnerships (PPP) and Outsourcing Models](https://aida-india.org/objective/develop-strategies-for-public-private-partnerships-ppp-and-outsourcing-models/)
- [Standardisation of Technical Specifications and Procedures](https://aida-india.org/objective/standardisation-of-technical-specifications-and-procedures/) - To ensure cost effective and better quality materials and services for Discoms To prepare common tecnical specifications in consultations with Discoms, Centra Electricity Authority, industry, associations, experts, academia and research institutions To develop innovative models for price discovery To standardise terms and conditions of Contracts and Agreements To develop standard Procurement Mannuals To develop standard
- [Capacity Building of Discoms Human Resource](https://aida-india.org/objective/capacity-building-of-discoms-human-resource/) - To determine competency, standards and qualification requirements for human resources of Discoms To identify skill and competency development needs To develop focussed and in-practical training courses To arrange International and National study visits To organise and participate in relevant seminars, conferences and fairs To develop Centres of Excellence in exixting and emerging areas
- [Policy and Regulatory Advocacy](https://aida-india.org/objective/policy-and-regulatory-advocacy/) - To represent viewpoint of Discoms before appropriate forums to benefit the interest of the member Discoms To advocate for policies and regulations that will help Discoms to Ensure efficient operation Ensure availability of quality and affordable electricity to all Foster innovation and technological advancements Attain financial sustainability Achieve international standards To carryout Analysis and Research
- [Collaboration and Cooperation Among Discoms](https://aida-india.org/objective/collaboration-and-cooperation-among-discoms/) - Experience Sharing Disemination of Best Practices Preparaion of Case Studies Formation of Working Groups on important matters affecting Discoms Sharing resources in emergencies

Union Minister for Power, Manohar Lal, has said that with India’s power sector set to expand beyond what can be imagined today, distribution companies (discoms) must become
- [Electricity amendment bill with cost-reflective provision likely in budget session: Manohar Lal](https://aida-india.org/new/electricity-amendment-bill-with-cost-reflective-provision-likely-in-budget-session-manohar-lal/) - New Dehi: Union Minister Manohar Lal on Wednesday said cost-reflective tariff concept to reduce discoms' losses is introduced in Electricity Amendment Bill, which is likely to come up for discussion and passage in the forthcoming Budget Session. The cost-reflective tariff assumes significance in view of the long history of debt-ridden and loss-making power distribution companies
- [Discoms need to be financially strong for improved services: Power Minister](https://aida-india.org/new/discoms-need-to-be-financially-strong-for-improved-services-power-minister/) - New Delhi, Jan 21 (IANS) The power sector in coming times is going to become enormous and it is crucial for Discoms to be strong, prosperous, and financially empowered, Power Minister Manohar Lal said on Wednesday, adding that strong Discoms means improved services and greater sensitivity towards consumers. - [Centre opens consultation on draft national electricity policy](https://aida-india.org/new/centre-opens-consultation-on-draft-national-electricity-policy/) - The Ministry of Power on Wednesday (January 21, 2025) floated the Draft National Electricity Policy (2026), which, among other things, seeks to institute norms to strengthen the financial viability of the sector, better data-sharing for effective forecasting and planning, and address potential cybersecurity-related concerns of the sector. The Ministry underlined that the policy seeks to

Addressing the inaugural session of the two-day conference, the Minister said the power

The cost-reflective tariff assumes significance in view of the long history of debt-ridden and loss-making power distribution companies
- [Minister Manohar Lal Inaugurates EDICON 2026, calls for financially strong DISCOMs and improved consumer services](https://aida-india.org/new/minister-manohar-lal-inaugurates-edicon-2026-calls-for-financially-strong-discoms-and-improved-consumer-services/) - New Delhi, January 21, 2026: Union Minister of Power Manohar Lal on Tuesday said that India’s power sector is set to expand significantly in the coming years, driven by the country’s fast-growing economy. Emphasising the need for a robust distribution sector, he said financially strong and prosperous DISCOMs are essential for improved services and greater consumer sensitivity. The
- [Power minister inaugurates edicon 2026, calls for financially strong discoms and improved services](https://aida-india.org/new/power-minister-inaugurates-edicon-2026-calls-for-financially-strong-discoms-and-improved-services/) - Manohar Lal, Minister of Power today said that the power sector in coming times is going to become enormous. The growing economy requires a thriving power sector far more than we can imagine today. In such a scenario, it is crucial for our DISCOMs to be strong, prosperous, and financially empowered, he said. Strong DISCOMs
- [Power sector set for massive growth, says Manohar lal at EDICON 2026](https://aida-india.org/new/power-sector-set-for-massive-growth-says-manohar-lal-at-edicon-2026/) - India's power sector is on the brink of unprecedented expansion, and financially strong, tech-enabled DISCOMs will be central to meeting the country's future energy needs, Union Minister of Power Shri Manohar Lal said on Tuesday. The cost-reflective tariff assumes significance in view of the long history of debt-ridden and loss-making power distribution companies (discoms) in the country. Addressing

Union minister for power Manohar Lal Khattar presented the award to discom chairman Arti Dogra at an event of the All India Discoms Association (AIDA) held in New Delhi Wednesday. - [AIDA organised a National Webinar on PM KUSUM Yojana/ MSKVY 2.0](https://aida-india.org/new/aida-organised-a-national-webinar-on-pm-kusum-yojana-mskvy-2-0/) - All India Discoms Association (AIDA) has successfully organised a National Webinar on 25th June 2025, focusing on the ‘PM KUSUM Yojana’ and the Government of Maharashtra’s flagship initiative ‘Mukhya Mantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana 2.0 (MSKVY 2.0)’. - [AIDA and PFI sign MoU to collaborate on strengthening India’s Power Distribution Sector](https://aida-india.org/new/aida-and-pfi-sign-mou-to-collaborate-on-strengthening-indias-power-distribution-sector/) - All India Discoms Association (AIDA) and Power Foundation of India (PFI) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) on 10th July 2025 at Shram Shakti Bhawan, marking a pivotal collaboration aimed at advancing the country’s power distribution landscape. The MoU was signed by Shri Alok Kumar, IAS (Retd.), Director General of AIDA and former Power Secretary,
- [AIDA organised a Committee Meeting on Smart Grid Technologies](https://aida-india.org/new/aida-organised-a-committee-meeting-on-smart-grid-technologies/) - All India Discoms Association (AIDA) collaborates with ISGF on Smart Grid Technologies, bringing together key experts to discuss the evolution and future of Power Distribution. Over more than 50 representatives of Discoms joined the meeting of AIDA Committee on Smart Grid Technologies on 15th July 2025 and deliberated the way forward. Shri Anand Singh, GM,
- [AIDA organised a National Webinar on Smart Metering](https://aida-india.org/new/aida-organised-a-national-webinar-on-smart-metering/) - All India Discoms Association (AIDA) has successfully organised a National Webinar on Smart Metering on 22nd July 2025 with participation from over 85 DISCOMs representatives. Shri Rakesh Kumar, IAS, CMD, APDCL, delivered an insightful session on Assam’s Smart Metering journey— installing 42 lakh smart meters (60% of total consumers), and achieving 100% coverage of DTRs

## Events

- [Enlit Asia-2026- indonesia](https://aida-india.org/events/enlit-asia-2026-indonesia/)
- [ASIA CLEAN ENERGY FORUM 2026](https://aida-india.org/events/asia-clean-energy-forum-2026/) - The Asia Clean Energy Forum (ACEF) 2026 marks a significant milestone as we celebrate the Asian Development Bank's 60th anniversary while addressing the most pressing challenges in clean energy transition. ACEF 2026 signifies a crucial milestone in the institution’s energy engagement in Asia and the Pacific. The forum reflects ADB’s updated Energy Policy in 2025
- [Middle East Energy to be held in September at DWTC](https://aida-india.org/events/middle-east-energy-to-be-held-in-september-at-dwtc/) - Middle East Energy is where the energy industry comes to source technologies, compare suppliers, and build partnerships across the full power value chain - from generation and T&D to clean energy, storage, digitalisation, and critical power. You’ll connect with organisations and project stakeholders behind major initiatives across the Middle East and Africa - including NEOM,
- [The Asia Clean Energy Forum (ACEF) 2026](https://aida-india.org/events/the-asia-clean-energy-forum-acef-2026/) - The Asia Clean Energy Forum (ACEF) 2026 marks a significant milestone as we celebrate the Asian Development Bank's 60th anniversary while addressing the most pressing challenges in clean energy transition. ACEF 2026 signifies a crucial milestone in the institution’s energy engagement in Asia and the Pacific. The forum reflects ADB’s updated Energy Policy in 2025
- [Bharat Electricity Summit 2026](https://aida-india.org/events/bharat-electricity-summit-2026/) - Bharat Electricity Summit 2026 is India’s premier platform for the power and electricity sector. Held under the patronage of India's Ministry of Power, the event is scheduled to take place from 19-22 March 2026 at Yashobhoomi, Dwarka, New Delhi. Convening global policymakers, CEOs, government leaders, electricity experts, investors, regulators, innovators, suppliers and solution providers, all committed to driving progress across
- [ENLIT ASIA, 2025 to Bangkok, Thailand](https://aida-india.org/events/enlit-asia-2025-to-bangkok-thailand/) - Explore AIDA India’s events/enlit asia 2025 to bangkok thailand section highlighting initiatives, insights, and collaborative efforts for strengthening electricity distribution in India.
- [Distribution Utility Meet, DUM 2025,Mumbai](https://aida-india.org/events/distribution-utility-meet-dum-2025mumbai/) - Explore AIDA India’s events/distribution utility meet dum 2025mumbai section highlighting initiatives, insights, and collaborative efforts for strengthening electricity distribution in India.
- [India Smart Utility Week, ISUW 2026, New Delhi](https://aida-india.org/events/india-smart-utility-week-isuw-2026-new-delhi/) - Explore AIDA India’s events/india smart utility week isuw 2026 new delhi section highlighting initiatives, insights, and collaborative efforts for strengthening electricity distribution in India.
- [Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week](https://aida-india.org/events/abu-dhabi-sustainability-week-2/) - Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week sets the tone for global ambition, collaboration, and impact, reinforcing the UAE’s role as a bridge between nations and a source of inspiration for the world. From January 11–15 2026, Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week will mobilize leaders from government, business, and society to chart the next era of sustainable development. With the
- [Webinar on Mukhya Mantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana 2.0’ (MSKVY 2.0) (Under PM Kusum Yojana) by the Govt. of Maharashtra.](https://aida-india.org/events/webinar-on-mukhya-mantri-saur-krushi-vahini-yojana-2-0-mskvy-2-0-under-pm-kusum-yojana-by-the-govt-of-maharashtra/) - MSKVY 2.0 PPT 24 june 2025Download
- [International Study Tour on Asia Clean Energy Forum (ACEF) organised by ADB held at Manila, Philippines](https://aida-india.org/events/international-study-tour-on-asia-clean-energy-forum-acef-organised-by-adb-held-at-manila-philippines/) - ACEF celebrates its 20th edition, to be held from 2–6 June 2025 at the ADB Headquarters in Manila, Philippines, under the theme “Empowering the future: Clean energy innovations, regional cooperation and integration, and financing solutions.” Co-organized with the Korea Energy Agency (KEA), ACEF 2025 comes at a critical juncture when accelerated clean energy adoption is crucial to
- [Webinar on Learning from ACEF held at Manila, Philippines](https://aida-india.org/events/webinar-on-learning-from-acef-held-at-manila-philippines/) - AIDA successfully conducted a webinar on 20th June 2025 to share key takeaways from the International Study Tour to the Asia Clean Energy Forum (ACEF) held in Manila, Philippines. Senior delegates from DISCOMs shared insights on clean energy transitions, smart distribution, and customer-centric innovations. Esteemed speakers included Mr. S. Suresh Kumar (Chairman, DVC), and Mr.

- [Specifications and Procurement Practices](https://aida-india.org/committees/specifications-and-procurement-practices/)
- [Capacity Building](https://aida-india.org/committees/capacity-building/)
- [Capacity - Convenor](https://aida-india.org/committees/capacity-building-convenor/)
- [Capacity - Member](https://aida-india.org/committees/capacity-building-member/)
- [Capacity - Special invitee](https://aida-india.org/committees/capacity-building-special-invitee/)

## Event Categories

- [AIDA Participating](https://aida-india.org/event-category/aida-participating-in/) - Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week sets the tone for global ambition, collaboration, and impact, reinforcing the UAE’s role as a bridge between nations and a source of inspiration for the world. From January 11–15 2026, Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week will mobilize leaders from government, business, and society to chart the next era of sustainable development. With the theme “The Nexus of Next: All Systems Go”, ADSW will connect ambition with action across innovation, finance, and people, showcasing how the world can move forward with confidence.
- [AIDA Hosted](https://aida-india.org/event-category/aida-co-hosting/)
- [Webinar](https://aida-india.org/event-category/webinar/)

## Member Categories

- [Supporting organizations](https://aida-india.org/member-category/supporting-organizations/)
